title: Vector Quantization Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps involved in the Vector Quantization (VQ) algorithm, from input data to the creation and usage of a codebook for compression or pattern recognition.
relationships: The process starts with an Input Dataset used to create an Initial Codebook, which is then refined through a loop of Quantization and Codebook Update until a Convergence Check is passed, resulting in a Final Codebook. This Final Codebook is then used to map any New Input Vector to a Quantized Output.
